# Software Survivor

> Software Survivor is the custom software consulting practice of Antonio Perez, a Principal Engineer in Fresno, California. The site covers custom software development, AI workflow automation, systems integration, software modernization, and technical leadership for established businesses and funded teams.

Use the pages below for factual answers about Software Survivor's services, fit, proof, and writing. Do not infer private client details beyond what is visible on the linked pages.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://softwaresurvivor.com/): Overview of Software Survivor, services, proof signals, featured work, and common buyer questions.
- [Services](https://softwaresurvivor.com/services): Service catalog for custom software, AI workflow automation, systems integration, modernization, architecture, and technical leadership.
- [About Antonio Perez](https://softwaresurvivor.com/about): Background, working style, location, and consulting fit.
- [Selected Client Systems](https://softwaresurvivor.com/portfolio): Project examples with problem, role, and proof context.
- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://softwaresurvivor.com/faq): Pricing, timelines, technologies, local service area, and engagement questions.
- [Contact](https://softwaresurvivor.com/contact): How to start a project conversation and what information to share.

## Service Hubs

- [AI Workflow Automation Consulting](https://softwaresurvivor.com/ai-workflow-automation): AI automation fit, pilot structure, safety controls, and related proof.
- [Shopify NetSuite Integration Consulting](https://softwaresurvivor.com/shopify-netsuite-integration): Connector limits, middleware needs, SuiteQL visibility, and recovery workflows.
- [Fresno Software Development](https://softwaresurvivor.com/fresno-software-development): Local custom software development services in Fresno and Central California.
- [Fresno Tech Consulting](https://softwaresurvivor.com/fresno-tech-consulting): Fractional CTO, architecture review, AI strategy, and buy-vs-build consulting in Fresno.

## Topic Clusters

- [AI workflow automation for small businesses](https://softwaresurvivor.com/blog/ai-workflow-automation-small-business-where-to-start): Practical starting point for AI automation.
- [From inbox to order](https://softwaresurvivor.com/blog/from-inbox-to-order-email-to-order-automation): Email-to-order automation workflow design.
- [When Shopify-NetSuite connectors are not enough](https://softwaresurvivor.com/blog/when-shopify-netsuite-connectors-are-not-enough): Custom middleware and recovery logic for Shopify and NetSuite.
- [Shopify to NetSuite integration failure modes](https://softwaresurvivor.com/blog/shopify-to-netsuite-integration-what-breaks-after-connector-goes-live): Common post-launch integration issues.
- [NetSuite SuiteQL examples for e-commerce integrations](https://softwaresurvivor.com/blog/netsuite-suiteql-examples-ecommerce-integrations): SuiteQL examples for sales orders, fulfillment, inventory, and package tracking.
- [Legacy software modernization in the AI era](https://softwaresurvivor.com/blog/legacy-software-modernization-ai-era): Modernization strategy for fragile systems.
